languages.text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл хирургеонам Сектум Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Уникальные технологии с Алтаря-Темплума позволили создавать аугменты, способные полностью заменить тонкие процессы человеческого организма и спасти жизни даже самых безнадежным.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.
languages.original_text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл хирургеонам Сектум Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Уникальные технологии с Алтаря-Темплума позволили создавать аугменты, способные полностью заменить тонкие процессы человеческого организма и спасти жизни даже самых безнадежным.

traits.locale_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちは、ルーグ・トレーダーに贈られた植込みの王座によって、金属に永遠に保存された生命のベールを剥がしました。アルター・テンプルの独自の技術により、彼らは人間の体の繊細なプロセスを完全に置き換える増幅器を作り、最も絶望的なケースでも命を救うことが可能になりました。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちは、ルーグ・トレーダーに贈られた植込みの王座によって、金属に永遠に保存された生命のベールを剥がしました。アルター・テンプルの独自の技術により、彼らは人間の体の繊細なプロセスを完全に置き換える増幅器を作り、最も絶望的なケースでも命を救うことが可能になりました。

languages.text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的船医们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。得益于祭坛的独特技术，船医们能制造出完全替代人体精密功能的植入物，即便最绝望的病症也能得救。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的船医们揭开了将生命永驻金属之中的奥秘。得益于祭坛的独特技术，船医们能制造出完全替代人体精密功能的植入物，即便最绝望的病症也能得救。

languages.text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux chirurgeons du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver éternellement la vie dans le métal. Les technologies uniques d'Altar-Templum leur permirent de créer des augmentations capables de remplacer complètement les mécanismes délicats du corps humain et de sauver des vies même dans les cas les plus désespérés.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux chirurgeons du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver éternellement la vie dans le métal. Les technologies uniques d'Altar-Templum leur permirent de créer des augmentations capables de remplacer complètement les mécanismes délicats du corps humain et de sauver des vies même dans les cas les plus désespérés.

languages.text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los cirujanos del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación eterna de la vida mediante el metal. La tecnología única de Altar-Templum les permitieron crear aumentos capaces de replicar los delicados procesos del cuerpo humano y salvar vidas incluso cuando parecía imposible.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los cirujanos del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación eterna de la vida mediante el metal. La tecnología única de Altar-Templum les permitieron crear aumentos capaces de replicar los delicados procesos del cuerpo humano y salvar vidas incluso cuando parecía imposible.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika cerrahları için metalde sonsuz yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Altar-Templum'dan gelen benzersiz teknolojiler, insan vücudunun hassas süreçlerinin yerini tamamen alabilen ve en umutsuz vakalarda bile hayat kurtarabilen ogmentler yaratmalarına olanak sağladı.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika cerrahları için metalde sonsuz yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Altar-Templum'dan gelen benzersiz teknolojiler, insan vücudunun hassas süreçlerinin yerini tamamen alabilen ve en umutsuz vakalarda bile hayat kurtarabilen ogmentler yaratmalarına olanak sağladı.

languages.text: Der {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Chirurgeums im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Die einzigartigen Technologien von Altar-Templum ermöglichten ihnen den Bau von Augmentationen, die die empfindlichen Prozesse des menschlichen Körpers vollständig ersetzen und selbst in hoffnungslosen Fällen Leben retten konnten.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The unique technologies from Altar-Templum allowed them to create augments that could completely replace the delicate processes of the human body and save lives even in the most hopeless cases.

traits.locale_text: Der {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Chirurgeums im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Die einzigartigen Technologien von Altar-Templum ermöglichten ihnen den Bau von Augmentationen, die die empfindlichen Prozesse des menschlichen Körpers vollständig ersetzen und selbst in hoffnungslosen Fällen Leben retten konnten.
